localization.en: How will this printer be used?
This helps HP offer you the best experience and options during printer setup.

Use primarily for personal or small business needs
Will complete setup myself
Plan to share printer with a few people
Printer located in a home or home-based business

Use primarily for large business or office needs
Will complete setup as an admin and get access to an admin dashboard
Plan to share printer with multiple employees or teams
Printer located in an office environment

Use printer for personal or home business needs: This could include printing schoolwork, recipes, labels, or invoices.

You plan to share the printer with trusted people: This could include your family, roommates, or employees in a home-based business.

You will use a basic Wi-Fi, Ethernet, or USB connection to the printer and don’t need advanced network features.

Use printer for business or enterprise needs: This could include printing reports, financial documents, or other paperwork.

You plan to share the printer with many employees, teams, or departments

The printer is located in an office environment and will be connected to a corporate domain network. You will have access to advanced network features.
